hemoglobin.action_low: URGENT: Critically low hemoglobin. Risk of severe anemia and organ failure.
hemoglobin.action_high: URGENT: Critically high hemoglobin. Risk of thrombosis.

white_blood_cells.action_low: URGENT: Critically low WBC. Severe risk of infection.
white_blood_cells.action_high: EMERGENCY: Critically high WBC. Possible leukemia or severe infection.

platelets.action_low: URGENT: Critically low platelets. Risk of serious bleeding.
platelets.action_high: URGENT: Critically high platelets. Risk of thrombosis.

glucose_fasting.action_low: EMERGENCY: Critically low blood glucose. Risk of hypoglycemic coma.
glucose_fasting.action_high: EMERGENCY: Critically high blood glucose. Risk of diabetic ketoacidosis.

creatinine.action_high: URGENT: Critically high creatinine. Possible kidney failure requiring dialysis.

potassium.action_low: URGENT: Critically low potassium. Risk of cardiac arrhythmia.
potassium.action_high: EMERGENCY: Critically high potassium. Risk of cardiac arrest.

alt.action_high: URGENT: Critically elevated ALT. Possible acute liver failure.

triglycerides.action_high: URGENT: Critically high triglycerides. Risk of pancreatitis.
